name: CodeBlock
description: Syntax-highlighted code display with copy functionality, theming, diff view, and collapsible sections

showCopy.description: Whether to show the copy button

title.description: Optional title displayed above the code block (external label)

filename.description: Optional filename shown in header bar inside code block

caption.description: Optional caption displayed below the code block

startLineNumber.description: Starting line number (useful for code excerpts)

addedLines.description: Lines marked as added in diff view (e.g., [2, "4-6"])

removedLines.description: Lines marked as removed in diff view (e.g., [1, 3])

wordWrap.description: Enable word wrapping for long lines

defaultCollapsed.description: Initial collapsed state (only applies when collapsible is true)

collapsedLines.description: Number of lines to show when collapsed

persistentCopy.description: Show a persistent copy button that is always visible

copyPlacement.description: Where to place the copy button when not using persistentCopy

bg.description: Custom background color for the code block (useful when the content area is pure black or dark gray)

onCopy.description: Callback fired when the copy button is clicked and copy succeeds

when: Displaying long code files with collapse functionality
guidelines: Always specify the correct language for accurate highlighting
Use filename prop to show source file name in header bar
Use copyPlacement="auto" to render copy in overlay mode when no filename is provided
Use title prop for external labels above the code block
Enable line numbers for longer code samples
Use highlightLines to draw attention to key lines
Set maxHeight for very long code blocks to prevent layout issues
Use collapsible for code samples that users may want to skim
Choose a theme that matches your documentation style
Keep code examples concise and focused
Use CodeBlock.Tabbed for multi-language snippets; tabs support controlled value/onValueChange and explicit tab values
accessibility: Code is presented in a semantic pre/code structure

examples.name: Default
examples.description: Basic code block with syntax highlighting
examples.code:
<CodeBlock code={`import { Button } from '@fragments-sdk/ui';

function App() {
  return <Button>Click me</Button>;
}`} language="tsx" />

examples.name: With Filename
examples.description: Code block with filename in header bar
examples.code:
<CodeBlock filename="app.tsx" code={`import { Button, Card } from '@fragments-sdk/ui';

function App() {
  return (
    <Card>
      <Card.Header>Welcome</Card.Header>
      <Card.Content>
        <Button>Get Started</Button>
      </Card.Content>
    </Card>
  );
}`} language="tsx" />

examples.name: With Title
examples.description: Code block with external title label

examples.name: With Caption
examples.code:
<CodeBlock
  code={`const API_URL = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL;`}
  language="typescript"
  caption="Environment variables must be prefixed with NEXT_PUBLIC_ to be available in the browser."
/>

examples.name: With Line Numbers
examples.code:
<CodeBlock code={`const greeting = "Hello";
const name = "World";
console.log(\`\${greeting}, \${name}!\`);`} language="typescript" showLineNumbers />

examples.name: Custom Start Line
examples.description: Shows code excerpt starting from a specific line number
examples.code:
<CodeBlock
  code={`  return (
    <button onClick={() => setCount(c => c + 1)}>
      Count: {count}
    </button>
  );
}`}
  language="tsx"
  showLineNumbers
  startLineNumber={15}
  caption="Lines 15-20 from Counter.tsx"
/>

examples.name: With Highlighted Lines
examples.code:
<CodeBlock code={`import { useState } from 'react';

function Counter() {
  const [count, setCount] = useState(0);

  return (
    <button onClick={() => setCount(c => c + 1)}>
      Count: {count}
    </button>
  );
}`} language="tsx" showLineNumbers highlightLines={[4, '7-9']} />

examples.name: Diff View
examples.description: Shows added and removed lines in a diff-like format
examples.code:
<CodeBlock
  code={`import { useState } from 'react';
import { useCallback } from 'react';

function Counter() {
  const [count, setCount] = useState(0);
  const increment = () => setCount(c => c + 1);
  const increment = useCallback(() => setCount(c => c + 1), []);

  return <button onClick={increment}>Count: {count}</button>;
}`}
  language="tsx"
  showLineNumbers
  removedLines={[6]}
  addedLines={[2, 7]}
/>

examples.name: GitHub Dark Theme
examples.code:
<CodeBlock
  code={`async function fetchUser(id: string) {
  const response = await fetch(\`/api/users/\${id}\`);
  return response.json();
}`}
  language="typescript"
  theme="github-dark"
/>

examples.name: GitHub Light Theme
examples.description: Using the GitHub Light theme for light backgrounds
examples.code:
<CodeBlock
  code={`def fibonacci(n):
    if n <= 1:
        return n
    return fibonacci(n - 1) + fibonacci(n - 2)`}
  language="python"
  theme="github-light"
/>

examples.name: Dracula Theme
examples.code:
<CodeBlock
  code={`fn main() {
    println!("Hello, Rust!");
}`}
  language="rust"
  theme="dracula"
/>

examples.name: Word Wrap
examples.description: Long lines wrap instead of scrolling horizontally
examples.code:
<CodeBlock
  code={`const longString = "This is a very long string that would normally cause horizontal scrolling, but with word wrap enabled it will break to the next line instead.";`}
  language="typescript"
  wordWrap
/>

examples.name: Max Height with Scroll
examples.code:
<CodeBlock
  code={`// This code block has a maximum height
function processItems(items: string[]) {
  const results = [];
  for (const item of items) {
    if (item.startsWith('_')) {
      continue;
    }
    const processed = item.trim().toLowerCase();
    if (processed.length > 0) {
      results.push(processed);
    }
  }
  return results;
}

export default processItems;`}
  language="typescript"
  maxHeight={150}
  showLineNumbers
/>

examples.name: Collapsible
examples.description: Long code that can be expanded/collapsed
examples.code:
(null); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); const [error, setError] = useState(null); useEffect(() => { async function fetchUser() { try { setLoading(true); const response = await fetch(\`/api/users/\${userId}\`); if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch'); const data = await response.json(); setUser(data); } catch (err) { setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Unknown error'); } finally { setLoading(false); } } fetchUser(); }, [userId]); if (loading) return
Loading...
; if (error) return
Error: {error}
; if (!user) return null; return (

{user.name}

{user.email}

); }`} language="tsx" showLineNumbers collapsible defaultCollapsed collapsedLines={8} />

relations.note: Can be wrapped in Card for additional context
Use in Tabs for showing code in multiple languages

propsSummary: filename: string - optional filename in header bar
maxHeight: number - max height with scrolling
CodeBlock.Tabbed: tabs[] plus optional defaultTab/value/onValueChange for multi-language snippets
